hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]]; then uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_PATH"; if [[ "$FILE" == generated/* ]] && [[ "$TOOL_INPUT_CONTENT" != *"# AXIOM GENERATED"* ]]; then echo "BLOCKED: Direct write to generated/ without AXIOM GENERATED header" >&2; exit 2; fi'

bash -c 'echo "\n🔍 Running quality checks..."; ERRORS=0; uv run ruff check src/ 2>&1 || ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); uv run mypy src/ --ignore-missing-imports 2>&1 || ERRORS=$((ERRORS+1)); if [ $ERRORS -gt 0 ]; then echo "⚠️  Quality issues detected. Consider fixing before moving on."; fi'
